scenario: Apex Health migrates a Spring Boot job worker to the Camunda 8.8 starter for 6000 jobs per day across an HTTPS Self-Managed Orchestration Cluster. The team finds 3 deprecated zeebe.client.security properties in their application.yaml and needs to know how each one maps to the replacement camunda.client.* properties or hints.
question: Which migration matches what the zeebe.client.security deprecation table documents for these three properties?

options.text: Move cert-path to camunda.client.ca-certificate-path, move override-authority to camunda.client.override-authority, and drop plaintext because it is now determined by the URL protocol (HTTP or HTTPS)

Move cert-path to camunda.client.security.ca-certificate-path, move override-authority to camunda.client.security.override-authority, and keep plaintext as camunda.client.security.plaintext for explicit control

Move cert-path to camunda.client.auth.ca-certificate-path, move override-authority to camunda.client.auth.override-authority, and convert plaintext to camunda.client.auth.plaintext for OAuth token endpoints

Move cert-path to camunda.client.cloud.ca-certificate-path, move override-authority to camunda.client.cloud.override-authority, and drop plaintext because Camunda 8 SaaS always uses HTTPS endpoints by default

a.text: Correct. The zeebe.client.security table lists camunda.client.ca-certificate-path as the replacement for cert-path and camunda.client.override-authority as the replacement for override-authority. The plaintext row has no replacement and the Hint states plaintext is now determined by the URL protocol (HTTP or HTTPS).

b.text: Incorrect. The replacement properties live directly under camunda.client, not under a camunda.client.security subgroup, and plaintext has no replacement at all in the new namespace.

c.text: Incorrect. camunda.client.auth holds OAuth-related properties such as token-url, client-id, and client-secret; certificate path and override authority do not live under camunda.client.auth.

d.text: Incorrect. The TLS properties move to camunda.client.ca-certificate-path and camunda.client.override-authority directly, not under camunda.client.cloud.

explanation: The zeebe.client.security deprecation table renames cert-path to camunda.client.ca-certificate-path and override-authority to camunda.client.override-authority. The plaintext property has no direct replacement and the Hint clarifies that plaintext is determined by the URL protocol (HTTP or HTTPS).

docs.title: Camunda Spring Boot starter properties reference
